markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, new page launches, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Industry Pages Live:** The first batch of \~40 industry pages is live, with a plan to scale production to 30 pages/week for completion by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**TLDRs Boost Clicks:** A 50-article A/B test shows TLDRs significantly increase organic clicks. The next step is to test them on top-performing pages and analyze their impact on LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**New Page Clusters Planned:** Airbyte is building new "Integration Pages" for each connector. These will be internally linked with the Industry and Use Case pages to form a powerful content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** New content drives \~7k weekly sessions. Airbyte's 9% citation share in Scrunch (vs. 8% for all competitors combined) confirms its leadership in AI-related search.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & SEO

  - [**Traffic Growth:** New GrowthX content drives \~7,000 weekly sessions, with strong growth in topics related to Flex pricing and plans.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**AI Search Leadership:** Airbyte's 9% citation share in Scrunch (vs. 8% for all competitors combined) confirms its leadership in AI-related search, especially for new topics like "hybrid data deployment."](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**TLDR A/B Test Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**SEO:** The 50-article (25 control, 25 test) experiment shows TLDRs significantly increase organic clicks, confirming a low-risk, high-reward tactic.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**GEO:** Test articles account for \~26% of citations for related queries, indicating strong early traction.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Analyze the impact on LLM referral traffic by tagging test/control URLs in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

### New Page Launches & Pipeline

  - [**Industry Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [The first batch of \~40 pages is live.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Production Plan:** Scale to 30 pages/week for completion by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
          - [Add industry-specific icons to fill blank thumbnail space.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
          - [Update the "Data Engineering Resources" link to point to current content, replacing the outdated "Tutorials" link.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Use Case Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [The next PSEO project.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [**Process:** Start with a wireframe for the design team, then build the automated pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [**Content:** Carrie will review Jakub's existing list of use cases for verification.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Airbyte is building new pages for each connector (e.g., "Notion Integrations").](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Strategy:** These will be internally linked with Industry and Use Case pages to create a powerful, interconnected content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Editorial & Experimentation

  - [**Editorial Mix:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Current Focus:** Hybrid deployment and data sovereignty.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** The team can pivot to new topic clusters from Airbyte to capture specific demand.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**New Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Context:** A 100-page batch of "Data Engineering Resources" is available for testing.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Plan:** Split the batch 50/50 between TLDRs and Airbyte's own AI summary feature to compare their effects.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

      - [Update the "Tutorials" link to "Data Engineering Resources" on Industry Pages.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Review Jakub's use case list to begin wireframing.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [File a ticket to tag TLDR test/control URLs in Looker for LLM traffic analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Share new topic clusters for the editorial calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Initiate the Cloudflare setup for Scrunch data verification.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**Nithin:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [Share the 100-page list for the TLDR vs. AI summary experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
      - [Share examples of AI summary implementations from other companies.](https://fathom.video/share/wRq29LouJCHwuyj-UkKxpg8yAShKycS8?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
